description: Retrieve all KEGG pathways for an organism, parse each KGML for protein-protein interactions, and export a per-pathway summary CSV plus a combined SIF interaction network.
rules: read-only — queries the KEGG API, writes local files only
ORGANISM is a KEGG organism code (hsa, mmu, dme, sce, eco, ...)
LIMIT caps analysis to the first N pathways (keep small to bound runtime/requests)
outputs written to record_store: pathway_summary.csv, all_interactions.sif, pathways/<id>_interactions.csv
usage: Set ORGANISM (KEGG code) and LIMIT (max pathways). Outputs: pathway_summary.csv, all_interactions.sif.
limitation: Needs the bioservices Python package and internet access to KEGG. Offline / package-absent runs still produce pathway_summary.csv (degraded, may be empty). Full-organism runs with no LIMIT issue thousands of KEGG requests.
